faqs.question: How do I change user roles?
faqs.answer: Admin Console > Team > Select Member > Change Role. Changes apply immediately.

faqs.question: Why can't I access a feature?
faqs.answer: Check your role permissions in Admin Console. Contact admin for role upgrade.

faqs.question: How do I set up SSO?
faqs.answer: Enterprise plans: Admin Console > Security > SSO. Supports SAML 2.0 and OIDC.
